title: Who is Emilio
subtitle: Beyond the code — a glimpse into the person behind the engineer.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: Triathlon is my passion — in 2017 I was the best duathlete in my category in Mexico. I also love gym and swimming. Endurance sports keep me disciplined and hungry for the next challenge.

books.title: Books
books.description: La Divina Comedia is my all-time favorite. I'm a devoted Tolkien fan — The Hobbit and the entire Middle-earth universe fuel my imagination.

games.title: Games
games.description: Zelda fan (Majora's Mask is the best one, fight me). Metroid Prime holds a special place. In 2019 I was the best Samus in my state in Super Smash Bros Ultimate. Mario Kart for the chaos.

music.title: Music
music.description: Metal and folk metal — I love the epic storytelling. I've been to 100+ concerts and seen 150+ bands live. If there's a mosh pit, I'm probably in it.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Competitive, passionate, and always looking for the next adventure. Whether it's a triathlon, a Smash tournament, or a metal concert — I go all in.
